disclaimer: DESIGN-ONLY spec. Not enforced. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims are made. This spec must not include buy/sell/hold/action fields.
purpose: Capture the result of a Point-in-Time (PIT) safety audit across one or more data sources. A pit-audit artifact documents rule-by-rule checks (PSR-01..PSR-15 or equivalent), forbidden-field scans, and the overall PIT-safety classification of each audited source. It does not claim predictive performance — it is a structural data-integrity gate.

phase.description: Producing phase identifier, e.g. P29I, P29F, P30

capturedAt.description: Timestamp when this audit scan was captured

overallResult.description: Overall audit outcome across all audited sources

sourceOutputs.description: Per-source audit results; must be non-empty

itemRequiredFields.sourceName: string — canonical source name (Quote | Regime | Chip | MonthlyRevenue | ...)
itemRequiredFields.result: enum: PASS_PIT_SAFE | PASS_PIT_SAFE_WITH_ASSUMPTION | WARN_ASSUMPTION_REQUIRED | BLOCKED | STRUCTURAL_PLACEHOLDER_ONLY
itemRequiredFields.forbiddenFieldsFound: string[] — must be empty to achieve PASS_PIT_SAFE
itemRequiredFields.ruleChecks: array of {ruleId: string, passed: boolean, detail: string}

disclaimer.description: Governance disclaimer asserting this is not investment advice

allowedAlphaScoreSources.description: Sources confirmed PIT_SAFE_VERIFIED for alphaScore pathway; must not list any source without prior audit

blockedSources.description: Sources explicitly blocked from any alphaScore pathway

ruleRegistry.description: Reference to the rule definition file, e.g. PSR-01..15 from p29i_pit_safety_rules.md

forbiddenFieldPatternGroups.description: Named groups of forbidden field patterns used by the scanner

fieldTypeExpectations.overallResult: one of the listed enum values; no buy/sell/hold semantics
fieldTypeExpectations.sourceOutputs: non-empty array; one entry per audited source
fieldTypeExpectations.forbiddenFieldsFound: must be an empty array [] to achieve PASS_PIT_SAFE; any populated value blocks that source
fieldTypeExpectations.entersAlphaScore_per_source: must remain false for all sources unless explicitly upgraded by a governance gate

mappedArtifacts.mapping: requiredFields.overallResult, requiredFields.sourceOutputs (Quote/Regime/Chip with PSR-01..15 ruleChecks), requiredFields.disclaimer, optionalFields.scannerVersion, optionalFields.allowedAlphaScoreSources, optionalFields.blockedSources
Companion test-execution record; documents that audit rules are test-covered (totalTests, testGroups, regressionSuites)

exampleSnippet._note: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE — not real data. Does not constitute investment advice.

ruleChecks.detail: PIT gate present in DB query path

sourceOutputs.reportLine: Quote: PASS_PIT_SAFE — ISO-to-ISO gate, asOf propagated

exampleSnippet.disclaimer: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims.
